overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a historical action game (Assassin's Creed Mirage) showing a character in medieval Islamic attire exploring a sunlit courtyard complex in Baghdad. The character moves through covered arcades, open gardens with decorative stonework, and elevated walkways while passing NPCs and observing the detailed Islamic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered marketplace walkway with pottery displays

events.description: exits covered arcade into open sunlit courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered walkway lined with pottery and carpets toward the courtyard exit

entered.detail: large stone archway with intricate carvings forming the covered walkway
wooden table displaying clay pots and ceramic vessels
ornate red runner carpet along the walkway floor
metal lantern suspended from the arcade ceiling
decorative carved stone balustrade overlooking garden

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered stone arcade lined with pottery displays and red carpets. The space is sheltered with diffused sunlight filtering through arches. At approximately 7.5 seconds, the character emerges from the covered walkway into a bright open courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: central courtyard with octagonal gazebo and flower beds

agents.ego_description: walking through the open courtyard passing the central gazebo and purple flower beds

notable_agents.action: guard in red robes standing near the gazebo observing the area

entered.detail: octagonal wooden pavilion with arched openings in the courtyard center
raised stone planter filled with blooming purple flowers
multi-story stone building with arched windows surrounding the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a sunlit open courtyard featuring a prominent wooden gazebo surrounded by vibrant purple flower beds. A guard in red robes stands near the gazebo. The architecture features sandy-colored stone buildings with traditional Islamic geometric patterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden path leading to elevated walkway entrance

events.description: approaching and passing through decorative lattice gate toward elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along garden path passing benches and potted plants toward an archway

notable_agents.action: civilian in red clothing walking ahead toward the building

entered.detail: decorative wooden lattice screen forming a gateway
stone seating with red cushion along the garden wall
large ceramic pot with flowering tree

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a garden path lined with stone benches and potted trees. The path leads toward a decorative lattice gate. Another pedestrian in red clothing walks ahead in the same direction, and the character passes through the gate toward an elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated balcony walkway overlooking lower courtyard

events.description: character pauses briefly to look over balustrade at courtyard below

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated balcony while observing the courtyard and buildings below

entered.detail: ornate carved stone railing along the elevated walkway edge
sunken garden area with cypress trees visible below the balcony
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the lower courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated stone balcony with decorative balustrades overlooking a lower courtyard with cypress trees. The perspective shifts to show the verticality of the architecture, with stone buildings rising on multiple levels and a distant minaret visible against the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground level garden with domed building view

events.description: descends from elevated walkway back to ground level garden

agents.ego_description: walking through garden area passing shrubbery and approaching wooden structures

notable_agents.action: distant figures walking near the domed building

entered.detail: large building with green-tiled dome and Islamic architectural details
well-maintained green hedges and flowering plants
open wooden framework structure providing partial shade

segments.scene_description: Returning to ground level, the character walks through a garden area with manicured shrubbery. A prominent green-domed building with intricate tilework becomes visible in the background. The character passes under a wooden pergola while distant NPCs move near the domed structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching decorated building entrance with blue tile facade

events.description: entering covered walkway with blue tile decorated walls

agents.ego_description: approaching building entrance with elaborate blue tile decoration and entering covered area

notable_agents.action: guard in red robes standing near the building entrance

entered.detail: building facade decorated with intricate blue and white geometric tile patterns
wooden shelving unit displaying various clay pots and ceramics
arched entrance leading into the interior of the building

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a building featuring elaborate blue tilework and Islamic geometric patterns. A guard stands near the entrance as the character passes pottery displays and enters a covered archway, transitioning from the bright exterior to a shaded interior space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of interconnected courtyards and gardens, transitioning from sheltered stone arcades to open sunlit plazas and finally into a tiled interior. It begins within a covered stone arcade lined with pottery and red carpets, moving through diffused light before emerging into a bright open courtyard featuring a wooden gazebo and vibrant purple flower beds. The camera then follows a garden path past stone benches and a decorative lattice gate, ascending onto an elevated balcony that reveals the verticality of the surrounding architecture and a distant minaret. As the perspective returns to ground level, the scene shifts through manicured shrubbery and under a wooden pergola toward a prominent green-domed building. Finally, the movement leads past elaborate blue tilework and a stationed guard, passing through a covered archway as the bright exterior light fades into a shaded interior space.
